"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); function logging(config) { function stripEmojis(str) { return str.replace( /[\p{Emoji_Presentation}\p{Extended_Pictographic}]/gu, "" ); } function formatLogArgs(args) { if (process.env.CI) { return args.map( (arg) => typeof arg === "string" ? stripEmojis(arg) : arg ); } return args; } return { log: (...args) => { if (!config.disabled) console.log(...formatLogArgs(args)); }, debug: (...args) => { if (!config.disabled) console.debug(...formatLogArgs(args)); }, info: (...args) => { if (!config.disabled) console.info(...formatLogArgs(args)); }, warn: (...args) => { if (!config.disabled) console.warn(...formatLogArgs(args)); }, error: (...args) => { if (!config.disabled) console.error(...formatLogArgs(args)); } }; } exports.logging = logging; //# sourceMappingURL=logger.cjs.map
